calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Continued To Mar-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Titto Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by defendant Riori Jones.
Default was entered against defendant on November 20, 2008.
Request for Judicial Notice was filed on January 7, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed January 9, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, and against the Defaulted Defendant Riori Jones as follows:

Defendant Riori Jones is enjoined and restrainied from being within 150 yards of any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526. Defendant Riori Jones is enjoined and restrained from entering into, or onto any San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
